headline: Jacobs Solutions (J) Poised to Thrive Amidst AI Revolution
summary: Platinum Asset Management, an investment management company, released its Q4 2025 investor letter for “Platinum International Technology Fund”. A copy of the letter can be downloaded here. The fund was up 3% in the fourth quarter and 13.1% for calendar 2025, surpassing the benchmark return of 2.5% and 12.4%, respectively. U.S. Dollar depreciation negatively impacted […]
